statement: Safe diagnostics for reduced comparisons: areal radius R (spherical), normalized static A, TT strain. Gauge-aware diagnostics (AB/kappa_areal, kappa response) must be labeled as gauge-aware. A_rad, raw W_i, and raw coordinate trace must not be used as physical observables without explicit suppression flags or parent derivation.

messages: Tier 2 claim lacks reason, provenance, evidence, or obligation links.
